name: Henan Zhongyuan Expressway Company Limited
summary: Henan Zhongyuan Expressway Company Limited engages in the investment, operation management, and maintenance of highways, independent bridges, and other transportation infrastructure projects. The company operates Zhengxi, Zhumadian, Zhengzhou, Pingdingshan, Zheng, Shangqiu, and Jixian County projects. It also engages in the highway construction, management, investment, and financing systems. Henan Zhongyuan Expressway Company Limited was founded in 2000 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
